conflicts.description: Chapter 13 places Marisol's earlier cover-up in Car 5 on the old northbound transfer, while chapter 18 identifies the same death as Car Four south of Marsh Crescent and names the chain ID as Tomas Aguilar.
conflicts.canonical_value: Treat the covered-up death as the Car Four / south of Marsh Crescent / Tomas Aguilar incident.
conflicts.resolution_note: The chapter 18 inquiry testimony is later, more specific, and immediately echoed in Gabriel's public reading, so it is more deeply embedded than the shorter confessional version in chapter 13.
